title: Lanvin Group Holdings reports Preliminary  FY results
content:
* Lanvin Group Holdings press release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20439835-lanvin-group-advances-strategic-transformation-and-portfolio-optimization-amid-challenging] (LANV [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LANV]): FY revenue of €240.5 million, 
 	* Excluding the divested Caruso business, revenues from continuing operations totaled €240.5 million, representing an 17.6% decrease year-over-year, reflecting both ongoing market volatility and the impact of its strategic initiatives aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and long-term brand positioning.
